notes: Use the `product` field on each family or address entry to manually override how the explorer groups contract interactions.
Entries marked `inferred: true` came from earlier local explorer mapping and tx-path analysis.

rujira-fin.name: RUJI Trade
rujira-fin.description: RUJI Trade contracts, the decentralized orderbook exchange (DEX) operating fully on-chain.

rujira-bow.name: RUJI AMM
rujira-bow.description: Automated Market Making strategies contracts adding liquidity to RUJI Trade orderbook.

rujira-ghost-credit.name: RUJI Credit Account
rujira-ghost-credit.description: Credit Account contracts for RUJI Money Market.

rujira-ghost-vault.name: RUJI Lending vault
rujira-ghost-vault.description: Lending vault and collateral management contracts for RUJI Money Market.

rujira-merge.name: RUJI merge
rujira-merge.description: Merge contracts for tokens eligble to merge into RUJI.

rujira-mint.name: Token factory
rujira-mint.description: Token factory helper contracts to mint token for Rujira ecosystem.

rujira-revenue.name: Revenue Converter
rujira-revenue.description: Revenue collector contracts that optionaly swap received tokens into a target token and distribute to a target address such as a staking contract.

rujira-staking.name: Staking
rujira-staking.description: Staking contracts used by RUJI and ecosystem projects such as sTCY and bRUNE.

levana-perpswap-cosmos-copy-trading.name: Levana Perps copy trading
levana-perpswap-cosmos-copy-trading.description: Copy-trading contract family for Levana Perps.

levana-perpswap-cosmos-countertrade.name: Levana Perps countertrade
levana-perpswap-cosmos-countertrade.description: Countertrade contract family for Levana Perps.

levana-perpswap-cosmos-cw20.name: Levana Perps CW20 helper
levana-perpswap-cosmos-cw20.description: CW20 helper/token contract family for Levana Perps.

levana-perpswap-cosmos-factory.name: Levana Perps factory
levana-perpswap-cosmos-factory.description: Factory contract used to deploy or coordinate Levana Perps market contracts.

levana-perpswap-cosmos-faucet.name: Levana Perps faucet
levana-perpswap-cosmos-faucet.description: Faucet/helper contract family for Levana Perps.

levana-perpswap-cosmos-market.name: Levana Perps market
levana-perpswap-cosmos-market.description: Perps market contract family for Levana Perps.

levana-perpswap-cosmos-position-token.name: Levana Perps position token
levana-perpswap-cosmos-position-token.description: Position-token contract family for Levana Perps.

levana-perpswap-cosmos-tracker.name: Levana Perps tracker
levana-perpswap-cosmos-tracker.description: Tracker contract family for Levana Perps.

nami-affiliate.name: RUJI Index affiliate
nami-affiliate.description: Affiliate contract used by the RUJI Index products.

nami-index-entry-adapter.name: RUJI Index entry adapter
nami-index-entry-adapter.description: Entry adapter contract family for RUJI Index.

nami-index-fixed.name: RUJI Index fixed
nami-index-fixed.description: Fixed index contract family for RUJI Index.

nami-index-nav.name: RUJI Index NAV
nami-index-nav.description: NAV index contract family for RUJI Index.

auto-workflow-manager.name: Auto workflow manager
auto-workflow-manager.description: Workflow manager contracts used by AutoRujira processes.

levana-perps.name: Levana Perps
levana-perps.description: Perpetuals contracts deployed for Levana Perps.

rujira-thorchain-swap.name: Virtualisation Strategy
rujira-thorchain-swap.description: AMM strategy connecting THORChain base layer pools to RUJI Trade orderbook on the app layer.

calc-manager.name: CALC Manager
calc-manager.description: Workflow manager contracts used by CALC Recurring Swaps.

calc-scheduler.name: CALC Scheduler
calc-scheduler.description: Workflow scheduler contracts used by CALC Recurring Swaps.

thor1yqf5spdv8c4088zmvqsg32eq63fzepsjvnt.name: RJI - The Rujira Index
thor1yqf5spdv8c4088zmvqsg32eq63fzepsjvnt.description: The Rujira Index (RJI) is a fixed-unit asset index that tracks the performance of tokens on the Rujira App Layer. RJI does not auto-rebalance, therefore by design continuously overweighting top performers and underweighting under-performers.

thor1mlphkryw5g54yfkrp6xpqzlpv4f8wh6hyw2.name: yRUNE - The Yield Bearing RUNE Index
thor1mlphkryw5g54yfkrp6xpqzlpv4f8wh6hyw2.description: The Yield Bearing RUNE Index (yRUNE) is an auto-rebalancing index that tracks the performance of RUNE and TCY while generating yield from TCY staking.

thor1h0hr0rm3dawkedh44hlrmgvya6plsryehcr.name: yTCY - The Yield Bearing TCY Index
thor1h0hr0rm3dawkedh44hlrmgvya6plsryehcr.description: The Yield Bearing TCY Index (yTCY) is an auto-rebalancing index designed to track the performance of both RUNE and TCY, with a strategic overweight on TCY to maximize yield potential.
